description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Elevate shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetics. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in black and yellow with lace-up fastening with thick, wax-coated laces for slip free knotting Synthetic and leather upper with synthetic PU overlaysEVA padded midsoleTPU outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareLeather and syntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
